name: White Eagle
description_short: Member-owned credit union serving Butler, Harvey, and adjacent Kansas counties for 91 years with auto loans, home equity loans, and digital banking services.
description_long: White Eagle Credit Union (WECU) has operated as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution for over 91 years, primarily serving residents of Butler County, Harvey County, and adjacent counties in Kansas. The credit union operates three physical branches in Augusta, El Dorado, and Newton, maintaining traditional brick-and-mortar banking alongside digital services. WECU offers a range of consumer lending products including auto loans, home equity loans, and term share accounts, along with online banking through WEOnline Services. The institution positions itself as community-focused, regularly hosting financial education events, document shredding services, and sponsoring local scholarships and community projects. What distinguishes WECU is its emphasis on local community reinvestment and member benefits, combined with accessible membership requirements (residents of service area only need valid ID, proof of address, and a $25 membership share deposit). The credit union actively promotes member engagement through social media, newsletter communications, and in-person community events. As a credit union, WECU is NCUA-insured and operates on a cooperative model where members are owners. However, membership is geographically restricted to specific Kansas counties, limiting accessibility compared to statewide or national institutions. The credit union demonstrates standard operational practices with regular business hours, text-based customer support, and security-conscious policies around member information.
services: Member education and financial literacy services
pros: 91-year operating history with established presence in local Kansas communities
Competitive auto loan rates starting as low as 4.95% APR
Home equity loans available at rates as low as 5.50% APR
Member-owned cooperative structure means profits benefit members rather than shareholders
Multiple branch locations with extended drive-up window hours (8 a.m. to 6 p.m. weekdays)
NCUA insurance protection for member deposits
Active community involvement with scholarships, shred days, and local sponsorships
Simple membership requirements with low $25 share deposit
Digital banking through WEOnline Services for remote account access
Text-based customer support available M-F 9 a.m. to 4:30 p.m.
cons: Membership restricted to Butler County, Harvey County, and adjacent counties—geographic limitation excludes most of Kansas and other states
Limited product information on website; specific terms, APRs, and fees not fully detailed for all loan types
Only three physical branch locations, which may be inconvenient for members in rural areas
No mention of personal loans, credit cards, or other consumer lending products beyond auto and home equity loans
Saturday lobby hours unavailable at all locations; limited Saturday drive-up access (9 a.m. to noon only)
best_for: Residents of Butler, Harvey, and adjacent Kansas counties seeking local community banking with member-ownership benefits
Auto buyers in the service area looking for competitive loan rates with a community-focused lender
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit from a local, established institution
Members prioritizing community reinvestment and local sponsorship over larger national financial institutions
diagnosis: White Eagle Credit Union is best suited for residents within its geographic service area (Butler, Harvey, and adjacent Kansas counties) who value local community banking, member-ownership benefits, and competitive lending rates. The primary caveat is strict geographic membership restriction—individuals outside the service area cannot join, making this institution inaccessible to most Kansas residents and those in other states.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: White Eagle — Credit Union in Augusta, KS | CreditDoc
meta_description: White Eagle — NCUA-insured credit union in Augusta, KS. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
